title: NBArmors
description:
It's just a mod that adds more additional armor and vanity items to use with the Dragon Block C mod and its addons.
The features do not affect the player experience, they are dragon ball themed armor to be used together with the Dragon Block c mod.
body:
It's just a mod that adds more additional armor and vanity items to use with the Dragon Block C mod and its addons.

Features:
- 12 armors of angels(Dragon ball super)
- 12 armors of hakais (Dragon ball super)
- 14 armors of supreme kai (Dragon ball super)
- 24 armors of character (Dragon ball - z- super - hero - and more)
- more and more soon.

The features do not affect the player experience, they are dragon ball themed armor to be used together with the Dragon Block c mod.
